user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable scheduled background jobs such as attendance, leave credit and confirmation jobs, so that automated HR processes run as required
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Job screen; When I toggle a job such as the attendance or leave credit job and click Save; Then the job's schedule setting is stored

user_story: As a System admin, I want to schedule the Acumatica integration job, so that data syncs with Acumatica automatically
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Job screen; When I answer whether to schedule the Acumatica job and save; Then the Acumatica job scheduling is applied

user_story: As a System admin, I want to specify employees and roles to be notified for a job, so that the right people are alerted about job outcomes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring a scheduled job; When I select an employee or role and click Add to list; Then the notification recipient is added

user_story: As a System admin, I want to reset IIS from this screen, so that job configuration changes take effect
acceptance_criteria: Given I have changed job schedules; When I click Reset IIS; Then the application recycles to apply the scheduling changes

user_story: As a System admin, I want to schedule reminder and utilization jobs such as timesheet reminder, timesheet utilization and document reminder jobs, so that employees receive timely automated reminders
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Job screen; When I enable the relevant reminder jobs and save; Then those reminder jobs are scheduled
